task.name: Edge Case Hunter
task.objective: Walk every branching path and boundary condition to find unhandled edge cases

critical.mandate: Method-driven, not attitude-driven — orthogonal to adversarial review
Exhaustively trace every decision point and boundary
Report ONLY unhandled cases — skip cases that are already covered
Include concrete examples for each edge case found

step.title: Load Target
step.action: Ask user for the document/code/design to analyze
Identify the type: requirements, code, API spec, user flow, etc.

step.title: Map Decision Points
step.action: Identify every branching path: - If/else conditions and their inverses - Switch/case branches and missing default - Input validation boundaries (min, max, zero, negative, null, empty) - State transitions and invalid state combinations - Concurrent access scenarios - Error handling paths and cascading failures - Timeout and retry boundaries - Data type boundaries (overflow, underflow, precision)

step.title: Trace Boundaries
step.action: For each boundary found: - Test the exact boundary value - Test one above and one below - Test with null/empty/missing input - Test with maximum possible input - Test with special characters or malformed data

step.title: Generate Report
step.template-output: Generate edge case report with: summary (N edge cases found, M critical), findings table (location, boundary type, unhandled case, concrete example, severity), and specific trigger scenarios for each finding.

output.format: Markdown edge case report with concrete test scenarios
